title: Maharashtra Chi Hasya Jatra Navya Korya Vinodacha Punha Nava Hangam
subTitle: Look who's joined the comedy bandwagon on Maharashtrachi Hasya Jatra! One of the best stand-up performers of Marathi television, Priyadarshan Jadhav, has set foot on the show. He gives an entertaining first performance, along with Prasad Khandekar.
